name: Joe Pera
bio: Joe Pera is an American comedian, writer, and actor known for a soft-spoken, grandfatherly delivery and gentle observations about everyday life. He created and starred in Adult Swim's Joe Pera Talks with You, which grew out of the special Joe Pera Talks You to Sleep, and released the stand-up special Slow and Steady on YouTube in 2023. His comedy is widely described as cozy, sincere, and disarmingly kind.

timeline.ev: Adult Swim special Joe Pera Talks You to Sleep
Joe Pera Talks with You premieres
Releases the special Slow and Steady

accolades: Creator and star of the critically acclaimed Joe Pera Talks with You
Host of the sleep podcast Drifting Off with Joe Pera
